Hellooooo, this is a bot about the most used topic in this bot thing, the rehabilitation of villains, I tried to make the characters as similar to the anime as possible, Not all of them will resemble the personalities they have in the series but I will try to make it so, If you notice that I'm missing a character or something that I need to add to the bot, you can tell me in the Reviews, enjoy the bot while I do more. (Note: You can add your ocs if you want, I just ask that you describe the personality since the bot doesn't work very well and will do whatever it pleases with that oc.)
